data.name: EmailAddress_Source
data.value: Errors raised when parsing a guest e-mail address from a request string.

data.name: Currency_Source
data.value: Errors raised when parsing a billing currency code from a request string.

data.name: Tag_Source
data.value: Errors raised when parsing a booking tag from an element of a request list.

data.name: BookingDate_Source
data.value: Errors raised when parsing a booking date (check-in / check-out) from a request string.

data.name: NightCount_Source
data.value: Errors raised when building the number of nights from a request value.

data.name: RoomNumber_Source
data.value: Errors raised when building a room number from an element of a request list.

data.name: Stay_Source
data.value: Errors raised when validating a stay's check-in and check-out dates together.

data.name: BookingEndpoint_Source
data.value: Primary-port errors raised by the booking endpoint when it binds an incoming request into a command.

data.name: EmailAddress_Malformed_Title
data.value: Malformed e-mail address

data.name: EmailAddress_Malformed_Description
data.value: An incoming request carries a value that is not a well-formed e-mail address, so it cannot be parsed into an EmailAddress value object.

data.name: EmailAddress_Malformed_Rule
data.value: A guest e-mail address must contain a single '@' with a non-empty local part and domain.

data.name: EmailAddress_Malformed_Cause1
data.value: The client sent a misspelled or truncated address (missing '@', empty local part or domain).

data.name: EmailAddress_Malformed_Hint1
data.value: Validate the address on the client, and compare the sent value against the expected format.

data.name: EmailAddress_Malformed_ShortMessage
data.value: The e-mail address is invalid.

data.name: EmailAddress_Malformed_DetailedMessage
data.value: The value provided is not a valid e-mail address.

data.name: Currency_Malformed_Title
data.value: Malformed currency code

data.name: Currency_Malformed_Description
data.value: An incoming request carries a value that is not a well-formed three-letter currency code, so it cannot be parsed into a Currency value object.

data.name: Currency_Malformed_Rule
data.value: A currency code must be exactly three upper-case ASCII letters (for example EUR).

data.name: Currency_Malformed_Cause1
data.value: The client sent a currency in the wrong shape (lower-case, a symbol, a name, or the wrong length).

data.name: Currency_Malformed_Hint1
data.value: Send the ISO-4217 alphabetic code in upper case, for example USD or EUR.

data.name: Currency_Malformed_ShortMessage
data.value: The currency is invalid.

data.name: Currency_Malformed_DetailedMessage
data.value: The billing currency code is not a valid three-letter code.

data.name: Tag_Malformed_Title
data.value: Malformed booking tag

data.name: Tag_Malformed_Description
data.value: An element of the request's tag list is empty, too long, or contains whitespace, so it cannot be parsed into a Tag value object.

data.name: Tag_Malformed_Rule
data.value: A tag must be a single non-empty token of at most 32 characters, without whitespace.

data.name: Tag_Malformed_Cause1
data.value: The client sent a blank tag, a phrase containing spaces, or an over-long value.

data.name: Tag_Malformed_Hint1
data.value: Send each tag as a single whitespace-free token; join multi-word tags with a hyphen.

data.name: Tag_Malformed_ShortMessage
data.value: A tag is invalid.

data.name: Tag_Malformed_DetailedMessage
data.value: One of the booking tags is not a valid single token.

data.name: BookingDate_Malformed_Title
data.value: Malformed booking date

data.name: BookingDate_Malformed_Description
data.value: An incoming request carries a value that is not an ISO yyyy-MM-dd date, so it cannot be parsed into a BookingDate value object.

data.name: BookingDate_Malformed_Rule
data.value: A booking date must be an ISO calendar date in the yyyy-MM-dd format.

data.name: BookingDate_Malformed_Cause1
data.value: The client sent a date in a locale-specific or malformed format, or an impossible calendar date.

data.name: BookingDate_Malformed_Hint1
data.value: Send dates in ISO 8601 yyyy-MM-dd form, for example 2026-08-10.

data.name: BookingDate_Malformed_ShortMessage
data.value: The date is invalid.

data.name: BookingDate_Malformed_DetailedMessage
data.value: A booking date is not a valid ISO (yyyy-MM-dd) date.

data.name: NightCount_NotPositive_Title
data.value: Non-positive number of nights

data.name: NightCount_NotPositive_Description
data.value: An incoming request asks for zero or a negative number of nights, which is not a valid stay length.

data.name: NightCount_NotPositive_Rule
data.value: A booking must be for at least one night.

data.name: NightCount_NotPositive_Cause1
data.value: The client sent a number of nights of zero or below.

data.name: NightCount_NotPositive_Hint1
data.value: Send a number of nights of one or more.

data.name: NightCount_NotPositive_ShortMessage
data.value: The number of nights is invalid.

data.name: NightCount_NotPositive_DetailedMessage
data.value: The requested number of nights must be one or more.

data.name: RoomNumber_OutOfRange_Title
data.value: Room number out of range

data.name: RoomNumber_OutOfRange_Description
data.value: An element of the request's room-number list is outside the supported 1-999 range.

data.name: RoomNumber_OutOfRange_Rule
data.value: A room number must be between 1 and 999 inclusive.

data.name: RoomNumber_OutOfRange_Cause1
data.value: The client sent a room number of zero, a negative value, or a value above 999.

data.name: RoomNumber_OutOfRange_Hint1
data.value: Send room numbers within the supported 1-999 range.

data.name: RoomNumber_OutOfRange_ShortMessage
data.value: A room number is invalid.

data.name: RoomNumber_OutOfRange_DetailedMessage
data.value: One of the requested room numbers is outside the supported range.

data.name: Stay_CheckOutNotAfterCheckIn_Title
data.value: Check-out not after check-in

data.name: Stay_CheckOutNotAfterCheckIn_Description
data.value: Both stay dates parse, but the check-out date is on or before the check-in date, so the stay has no positive length. This cross-field rule is enforced by the Stay.Create factory.

data.name: Stay_CheckOutNotAfterCheckIn_Rule
data.value: Check-out must be strictly after check-in.

data.name: Stay_CheckOutNotAfterCheckIn_Cause1
data.value: The client sent a check-out date equal to or earlier than the check-in date.

data.name: Stay_CheckOutNotAfterCheckIn_Hint1
data.value: Send a check-out date at least one day after the check-in date.

data.name: Stay_CheckOutNotAfterCheckIn_ShortMessage
data.value: The stay dates are invalid.

data.name: Stay_CheckOutNotAfterCheckIn_DetailedMessage
data.value: The check-out date must be after the check-in date.

data.name: PlaceBooking_CommandInvalid_Title
data.value: Booking request invalid

data.name: PlaceBooking_CommandInvalid_Description
data.value: The endpoint could not bind the incoming request into a booking command: one or more arguments were missing or invalid. Every failure is collected under this envelope, each with its full argument path.

data.name: PlaceBooking_CommandInvalid_Rule
data.value: Every required argument must be present, and every argument must convert into its value object.

data.name: PlaceBooking_CommandInvalid_Cause1
data.value: The client sent a request that violates the endpoint's contract (missing or malformed arguments).

data.name: PlaceBooking_CommandInvalid_Hint1
data.value: Read the inner errors: each names the failing argument and the rule it violated.

data.name: PlaceBooking_CommandInvalid_ShortMessage
data.value: We could not accept your booking request.

data.name: PlaceBooking_CommandInvalid_DetailedMessage
data.value: One or more details of the booking request are missing or invalid.

data.name: PlaceBooking_StayInvalid_Title
data.value: Booking stay invalid

data.name: PlaceBooking_StayInvalid_Description
data.value: The stay sub-object of the request could not be bound: one or both of its dates were missing or malformed. Its failures are grouped under this nested envelope, with paths prefixed by Stay.

data.name: PlaceBooking_StayInvalid_Rule
data.value: Both stay dates must be present and valid ISO dates.

data.name: PlaceBooking_StayInvalid_Cause1
data.value: The client sent a stay with a missing or malformed check-in or check-out date.

data.name: PlaceBooking_StayInvalid_Hint1
data.value: Read the inner errors under the Stay path for the failing date.

data.name: PlaceBooking_StayInvalid_ShortMessage
data.value: We could not read the stay dates.

data.name: PlaceBooking_StayInvalid_DetailedMessage
data.value: The check-in or check-out date of the stay is missing or invalid.

data.name: PlaceBooking_GuestInvalid_Title
data.value: Booking guest invalid

data.name: PlaceBooking_GuestInvalid_Description
data.value: A guest in the request's guests list could not be bound: its first name was missing or its e-mail was malformed. Its failures are grouped under this per-element envelope, with indexed paths such as Guests[1].

data.name: PlaceBooking_GuestInvalid_Rule
data.value: Each guest must have a first name, and any e-mail present must be valid.

data.name: PlaceBooking_GuestInvalid_Cause1
data.value: The client sent a guest with a missing first name or a malformed e-mail address.

data.name: PlaceBooking_GuestInvalid_Hint1
data.value: Read the inner errors under the indexed Guests[i] path for the failing field.

data.name: PlaceBooking_GuestInvalid_ShortMessage
data.value: A guest's information is invalid.

data.name: PlaceBooking_GuestInvalid_DetailedMessage
data.value: One of the guests is missing a first name or has an invalid e-mail address.
